review_policy.completion_rule: Move an item toward mastered only after the learner uses it naturally in self-generated output or dialogue.
review_policy.do_not_mark_mastered_for: Recognition, multiple choice, or copying assistant examples.

queue.prompt: Use this phrase to start a short paragraph about a real daily problem.
Describe an action you repeat even when you want to stop.

queue.item: spend time on / spend time doing
queue.prompt: Compare how much time you spend on your phone and reading.
Say what you want to make time for and what gets in the way.
Explain a habit or mistake and how you feel about it.
Say one thing you find hard to do and why.
Explain whether you can control your phone use.
